title: Glarks 307Pcs Picture Hanging Kit, Picture Frame Hanger Tool with Level Ruler and 306Pcs Nails, Hooks, Hanging Wire, Screw Eyes, D Ring and Sawtooth Hanger for Frame Hanging Wall Mounting
features: ♛【What You Get:】In this picture hanging kit, it include 75pcs hooks which are 30pcs 10lb, 20pcs 20lb, 15pcs 30lb, 6pcs 40lb, 4pcs 75lb. 20pcs sawtooth hanger, 50pcs screw eyes, 100pcs mounting screws, 20pcs d-ring hanger, 20pcs triangular ring hanger, 20pcs 20lb and 40lb one step hangers, a picture hanging tool and a 5m steel wire total 307pcs packed in a box.

♛【Multipurpose Hanging Kit:】This set included all you need that can be applied on all surfaces like drywall, concrete or wood. Perfect for hanging picture frames, wedding photos, posters, wall plants, framed maps, postcards, clock, cross stitch, fashion decorations, planters, tools, kitchenware and art paintings in home, office and workplace.

♛【Durable Quality:】Our picture hangers are made of high quality material. Picture hooks are made of brass plated steel, rust-proof, strong and durable; Picture hanger and screw are made of nickel plated metal, heavy duty and not easy to break. Picture hanging wire is made from braided stainless steel cable, which is corrosion, kink, and rust resistant, works great with the hangers.

♛【No Damage to Wall:】Our small nails and screws are sharp and tiny, there just a little hole when they are nailed on the wall, and almost no trace of the outside. The nails are matched well with their hooks, and we have prepared extra nails as considering the loss in use.

♛【Picture Frame Wire:】Set include a 5m/16.4ft hanging wire to be used in combination with D-rings. The wire is securely attached to each D-ring on both sides of the frame. There should be a little slack so that your frame hangs on the wire nicely.
description: Glarks 307Pcs Picture Hanging Kit, Picture Frame Hanger Tool with Level Ruler and 306Pcs Nails, Hooks, Hanging Wire, Screw Eyes, D Ring and Sawtooth Hanger for Frame Hanging Wall Mounting ♣【Specifications】: ▲ Main Material: Steel, Plastic ▲ Color: Silver, Black, Yellow ▲ Finish: Nickel Plated, Brass Plated ▲ Quantity: 307pcs ♣【Product Feature】: ♛ Including 307pcs of photos frame hangers and hanging tool kit, meet your different hanging needs and help you solve picture hanging problems. ♛ Products are made of high quality made material. Rust-proof, strong and durable, heavy duty and not easy to break. ♛ Small nails will no damage to the wall, there just a little hole when they are nailed on the wall and almost no trace of the outside. ♛ Come with 5m/16.4ft hanging wire to be used in combination with D-rings, used for hanging picture and postcards. ♣【Wide Application】: ★ Perfect for hanging picture frames, wedding photos, posters, wall plants, framed maps, postcards, clock, cross stitch, fashion decorations, planters, tools, kitchenware and art paintings in home, office and workplace. ♣【Package Included】: 10 lb hooks x 30pcs 20 lb hooks x 20pcs 30 lb hooks x 15pcs 40 lb heavy duty hooks x 6pcs 75 lb heavy duty hooks x 4pcs Gold screw eyes x 50pcs Gold one hole d-ring hanger x 20pcs Triangle ring picture hangers x 20pcs Gold sawtooth picture hangers x 20pcs 13mm nails x 40pcs 26mm Nails x 89pcs 38mm Nails x 100pcs Gold screws x 40pcs 20lb one step hanger x 10pcs 40lb one step hanger x 10pcs Picture hanging tool x 1pc Picture steel twisted wire x 1pc Note ♥ There are screws on the back of the picture hanging tool, please keep away from children, be careful not to hurt your hands when using it.
